changes: Home page: search-first layout, cleaner copy
All tools now listed in the sidebar
Home page redesigned with categorised tool directory and featured sections
Tints & Shades: click-to-copy tooltip on colour swatches and hex labels
PDF compressor: lossless FlateDecode re-encoding option for screenshots and illustrations
Usage tracking replaced with explicit "👍 This helped me" button
Font Tools: combined Font Converter, Font Inspector and Font Pairs into a single tabbed page
Contrast tool: WCAG AAA (7:1) nearest-match colour suggestions and redesigned right column
Colors: new Tints & Shades tab with CSS variable and JSON export
